narrative_beat: Mapa-mundi renascentista com trinta e sete mil pontos vermelhos sobrepostos

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a huge renaissance-style world map on aged parchment painted in rich ochre, gold and crimson pigments, covered with thirty-seven thousand vivid red dots clustering in dense formations over specific regions
subject.focal_point: the densest crimson cluster near the center of the map
subject.secondary: Side candles cast warm raking light onto the parchment; low smoke drifts across the table.
props: aged parchment world map in renaissance style
dense cluster of crimson red dots

environment.location: a gothic council hall with broken arched windows

composition.foreground: parchment map in warm ochre, gold and crimson tones
composition.midground: wooden table surface with visible grain
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white gothic hall with broken arches

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, parchment texture, floating orange embers

symbolism.primary: global death foretold in ancient cartography
symbolism.secondary: each dot as a soul condemned by algorithm

negative_as_positive: clean parchment without modern text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
